checklist.requirement: Use the named Board A markdown as the live contract

checklist.blocker: scoped daily/source inventory exists, but strict full-market/full-timeframe/full-cycle objective remains false in current cursor
checklist.requirement: MainRegimeV2 Bull/Bear/Sideways/Crisis have source-backed 95% scoped evidence

checklist.blocker: QQQ/NQ daily cross-market attachment exists, but full universe and intraday/native source-label cells remain incomplete
checklist.requirement: Validate regime evidence on other markets

checklist.blocker: native subhour ready overlap cells 0 of 4; gate native_subhour_overlap_blocker_v1=no_source_overlap_0of4_cells
checklist.requirement: Validate regime evidence on other timeframes

checklist.blocker: pooled axis passes but split/species gates remain blocked: chrono=False symbol=False venue=False species=None
checklist.requirement: Direct Manipulation R6 uses direct event/order-lifecycle rows, not OHLCV proxy

checklist.blocker: provider status must be interpreted per-provider; unavailable providers are non-promoting for confidence gates
checklist.requirement: Check yfinance, IBKR, TradingViewRemix/MCP, Kraken provider paths

checklist.blocker: live NQ/yfinance is required evidence when successful; demo is only downstream surface exercise, not market validation
checklist.requirement: Run ict-engine live/provider analysis plus fallback demo analysis

checklist.blocker: green command surface does not imply mature rows or strict objective closure
checklist.requirement: Run CatBoost/policy-training and structural path-ranker export

checklist.blocker: current cursor explicitly blocked; R6 split/species, R5 recency, R3 native-subhour, and full cross-context coverage remain open
checklist.requirement: Do not mark goal complete until every explicit requirement is covered
